fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the shipping agent to which the shipping agent service is linked.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the shipping agent.

fields.name: Shipping Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies how long it takes from when the items are shipped from the warehouse to when they are delivered.

fields.name: Base Calendar Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a customizable calendar for shipment planning that holds the shipping agent's working days and holidays.
